goals.goal: Maintain this JSON plan with implementation checkmarks.
Make batch_size=0 choose a bounded frame chunk from source/output pixel cost.
Preallocate the final output and write each processed frame chunk into it.
Keep explicit batch_size as a deterministic override.
Add failing-first tests for chunk planning and 100-frame output preservation.
Document automatic and manual video-batch tuning.
Run CPU and CUDA video-batch smoke tests.
